purposeDescription: Hitler / Nazi Germany subset of the Sacrifice Law comparative corpus. This link records the Nazi Germany case's participation in the four-case sacrifice-law-workbench corpus for cross-case comparison under Koenigsberg's Law of Sacrifice.

rightsStatus.notes: Nazi-era source texts may include public-domain originals, but translations and scholarly apparatus require rights review before import.

claimStatus.notes: No Sacrifice Law child-repository claims, public support ratings, or comparative conclusions are promoted into PPW findings by this link. Any future draft claims must enter PPW at reviewStatus: draft and pass the PPW claim-promotion gate before appearing as reviewed findings.
